app.name: ATTACK: v1 note data exceeds max size

notes: NEGATIVE CONTROL (expectRejected=true): models a v1 spend whose note data payload exceeds the protocol maximum, which the post-Bythos mempool DROPS as %v1-note-data-exceeds-max-size.
The note-size invariant MUST catch it; expectRejected inverts the caught violation to a green proof-of-prevention.
rejectionCode names the exact consensus reason so the lab report surfaces which rejection this control proves.

steps.title: Inspect the submitted note's data size

invariants.title: A note's data payload must not exceed the protocol maximum size (8192 bytes)
